blockedClaims.text: The BAA language is already approved and onboarding will start next week.
blockedClaims.reason: Legal Slack and SOW both say BAA language remains under review, and kickoff timing depends on security approval, signed BAA, and PO.
blockedClaims.safeAlternative: We’ll send the approved security materials now and confirm BAA timing before finalizing the kickoff date.

blockedClaims.text: We can also provide immutable audit-log exports in the first release.
blockedClaims.reason: Product scope says immutable audit-log export is planned, not included in the first release.
blockedClaims.safeAlternative: Admin audit logs are included for configured workflow actions; export scope can be reviewed separately.

blockedClaims.text: We can start processing workflow data before the paperwork is fully complete.
blockedClaims.reason: The MSA excerpt prohibits processing patient-adjacent workflow data before BAA execution.
blockedClaims.safeAlternative: Workflow data processing will begin after the BAA is mutually executed.
